contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 10
- Description: OPEN_FOLLOWUPS.md backlog index + Beer Hall digest daily-framing rename
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/64
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/86
  
  Details:
  Two small documentation/prompt changes shipped via worktree-isolated branches (the agentic_ai_context repo had an active concurrent Claude session that clobbered an earlier attempt — recovered the orphaned commit via cherry-pick into a fresh worktree).
  
  ## What landed
  
  1. **`OPEN_FOLLOWUPS.md`** in `agentic_ai_context` (#64) — new top-level cross-session backlog index for scoped follow-up tasks that span sessions / agents. Workflow documented inline: claim by appending a line to `CONTEXT_UPDATES.md`, ship via PR, then move the entry to `## Recently shipped` with the PR link. First entry covers the deferred ops-health v2 burn-rate / days-of-cover work, with an inline sparsity probe so the next session knows whether to start. Distinct from `CONTEXT_UPDATES.md` (event log), in-code TODOs, and in-doc parking patterns like the Q5 entry in `PARTNER_VELOCITY_PROPOSAL.md`.
  
  2. **Beer Hall digest reframed daily, not weekly** (#86) — the workflow has shipped daily for months but the LLM drafter prompt still said *"weekly digest"*, so Message 1 routinely opened *"this week we …"*. Five rephrases in `scripts/draft_beer_hall_digest.py` (system prompt, slug guidance, user template, evidence-section header, module docstring). Added explicit anchoring instruction: frame Message 1 as today's update; let evidence window stay wider than 24 h by design. Evidence look-back flags (`--since-days 7` / `--telegram-hours 48`) deliberately unchanged — separate concern from publish cadence.
  
  ## Process note (saved to memory)
  
  Used `git worktree add` for both repos this time after the agentic_ai_context attempt got clobbered by a concurrent Claude switching branches under my unstaged working tree. Saved the lesson as `feedback_use_worktree_for_parallel_sessions.md` so future sessions default to worktrees in any repo where parallel sessions are mentioned.
  
  ## Pull requests
  
  - TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context — https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/64
  - TrueSightDAO/go_to_market — https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/86
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 16.67
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
